label: Gauranlen tree mode
description: Defines a dryad caste mode for the Gauranlen tree, including its pawn kind, UI position, required memes, displayed stats, and info-card hyperlinks.

previousStage.label: Previous stage
previousStage.description: The dryad caste that must be unlocked before this one becomes available in the selection dialog. Unused in shipped defs but present in source as an optional progression link.

pawnKindDef.label: Pawn kind
pawnKindDef.description: PawnKindDef that identifies the dryad caste spawned when this mode is active.

requiredMemes.label: Required memes
requiredMemes.description: MemeDefs that must be present in the colony ideology before this caste becomes selectable. Leave empty for castes available to all ideologies.

drawPosition.label: Draw position
drawPosition.description: UI grid position of this caste's icon in the dryad selection dialog, as (x, y).

displayedStats.label: Displayed stats
displayedStats.description: StatDefs shown in the mode selection panel when the player hovers over or selects this caste.

hyperlinks.label: Hyperlinks
hyperlinks.description: Def links shown in the mode info panel. Each element tag identifies the target def type (e.g. ThingDef). Same mechanism as descriptionHyperlinks on Def but stored separately.
